original text:
Daybreak is here! Let's get it on. This will be a 5 player all-expansion (B+P+X+D) game to Kobol. No Cylon Leader/Mutineer, Final Fives but no Personal Goals, no Cylon Fleet, no house rules.
Some may want to hold their place at the top of the waitlist for a Search for Home or Cylon Leader/Mutineer game; no hard feelings if you decline. I prefer five players over six or seven because the games tend to be much brisker, and I think the game balance is best with three humans and two cylons.
Please come prepared to check in at least twice a day, 6-8 hours apart so that we can move things along at a good clip.
Remember that you have to own the game in order to play PBF. Since this is a pretty new expansion, I'll be reluctant to post/GM anything that you should have information about - buy the game!
This was made possible by ColtsFan76 and he has my undying thanks for that. I will also be using the Open Office spreadsheet and GIMP files created by Orphius and completely revamped by :jasperhawk:. I think they are amazing.
All players must have their own copies of the game (this is an FFG requirement).
Follow PBF conventions. Bold your actions! I will not process anything until bolded. Use italics for in-character talk, and use images for flavor and fun. Find lots of them here: http://boardgamegeek.com/geeklist/item/1834905#item1834905.
Use the image banners so we know who you are. If you're on a mobile device and don't want to look up your bannerID, please put your character name at the top of your post.
Don't communicate with other players outside the thread. Any private communication should be between me and particular players. If you have a question that you don't want to ask publically, ask me, that's what I'm here for!
Subscribe to the thread! I expect that you will be able to check in twice a day, at least 6-8 hours apart.
Use Conditional Orders (COs) and the game will run smoothly. The game is much more enjoyable when it's moving along and not getting stalled for days. If I have questions about your COs I will ask you privately, I'm not interested in trying to "screw" you by executing a CO that clearly didn't account for something.
I like to make my board images after the current player has received their cards, so everyone knows how many cards are out there. So if you have a variable draw, please send in your COs for those as soon as you can.
I will assume that each player has the following standing COs. Send me a GM when you'd like to act otherwise.
* If everybody else has responded to an interrupt and you haven't, and you don't have the cards in question, I will pretend you sent me a pass CO. This will not divulge hand information since I will also pass those who sent me a pass CO at the same time.
* If there are multiple conflicting CO interrupts, and the players have not worked out whose to play, I will play the lowest-valued interrupt. If it's still tied, I will play the interrupt for the player whose turn is coming up sooner.
Don't quote anything from more than two pages back in the thread. Say what you think happened in your own words.
I am a HuMod (	 Battlestar Galactica - Not a Cylon ) and make mistakes or miss things, so please tell me if you think anything is wrong! It probably is.
I'll accept the invitation, but as an alternate.
I'm still in V60 West (seriously that game is never going to end) and I still need to pick up a copy of Daybreak, so I will decline for now. Thanks for the invite.
markino and jpg87 are playing in BSG 377, but I forgot to remove them from the wait list.
Thanks for the invite, but I don't have daybreak yet, so I'll have to decline.
OK! Looks like we'll need quite a few more invites then. Arcadious, you're in if you want.
I expect to see Cain + New Baltar if you're going all expansions without house rules.
I guess there isn't nearly as much interest in Daybreak as I assumed! Clem, you're in for sure.
I'll send out some more invites and it'll be first come first served. I'm hoping to have this launched this weekend.
Thanks for the invitation! I will join the game.
I will have to decline, as I'd hate to play without the Cylon Fleet board and things are a bit busy around here just now.
Have fun, though! I can't wait to try Daybreak sometime!
Hey guys! Thanks for the invitation, I would gladly join! The only issue is that I still don't have daybreak...is that a problem?
In in! Let's do this!
I'm sorry, but you do need to have a copy of Daybreak to play. I'm not able to reveal information about the text on crisis cards, character sheets, etc.
We have a crew! Please subscribe to the thread!
Highest rolls will go first.
I will lead humanity on it's way to Earth. But first we are to visit Cobol. Because I said so.
Well, time to try a new Daybreak character... but which one?
For everyone else, you're welcome to wait until you see your loyalty to select starting draws, but if it won't matter feel free to GM me.
Will draw one each for opening draw.
